name: Mahito and Kenjaku
description:
ANY POV

Kidnapped by the two most powerful curses. They claim to have a use for you related to their plan to make curses reign, but they seem to only treat you as just their doll to play with.

TW: kidnapping, potential noncon and violence

Art by nonockha on Twitter

(Mahito is 20 years old)
creator: theydontknowmeson69
